macro.title: United Airlines flight to Spain pulls U-turn, apparently over Bluetooth device name - NPR
macro.summary: The flight to Palma de Mallorca diverted back to Newark late on Saturday. Air traffic audio and social media posts indicate an onboard Bluetooth device raised security concerns.
